name: #510 · 7ac2052451e0efd36162e1d16ab3f0375c8fb3a0 · Karol Wojcik · fix: compose around hooks correctly in cli integration tests

newTests.name: Tests for common-testing-context function > blank contexts ignored > ignores blank context strings
Tests for write-environment-properties! commit.author support > writes standard environment properties
Tests for ui-step macro > without browser (no pg) > ui-step executes body and returns result without pg
Tests for ui-step macro > without browser (no pg) > nested ui-steps work
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true} (ui-step equivalent) > works with pg bound
Tests that with-page and with-traced-page accept context-opts > with-page-opts accepts context-opts > binds (.context pg)
Tests for common-testing-context function > single context > returns the single context when only one distinct context
Tests for build-display-name function > handles multi-level context
Tests for build-display-name function > prepends context to test name
Tests for common-testing-context function > no assertions > returns nil when no assertions have :context
Tests for write-environment-properties! commit.author support > includes commit.author when COMMIT_AUTHOR env is set
Tests for build-labels subSuite support > includes subSuite label when sub-suite is provided
Integration: with-page fixture auto-captures network calls > auto-capture with with-page > API calls through (.request (.context pg)) work correctly
Tests for unified step macro with opts map > step with {:screenshots? true} (ui-step equivalent) > works without pg bound

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI eval-sci mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > navigate script evaluates successfully
Tests for common-testing-context function > no common prefix > returns nil when contexts share no prefix
Tests for common-testing-context function > no assertions > returns nil for empty assertions
Tests for build-labels subSuite support > includes suite, parentSuite, package for namespaced test
Tests that with-page and with-traced-page accept context-opts > with-traced-page-opts accepts context-opts > binds (.context pg)
Tests for common-testing-context function > single context > returns single context for one assertion
Tests for common-testing-context function > common prefix > extracts multi-level common prefix
Tests for build-labels subSuite support > omits subSuite label when sub-suite is nil
Tests for build-display-name function > returns test name without context
Tests for common-testing-context function > common prefix > extracts common prefix from multiple contexts
Tests for ui-step macro > without browser (no pg) > ui-step with side effects works

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI eval-sci mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > fill script evaluates successfully
Tests for build-labels subSuite support > always includes framework=clojure.test
